mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.summary, p.status, p.view_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_locked, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.id AS author_id, u.name AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.post_id = p.id) AS reply_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS like_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` l WHERE l.post_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_liked
0 AS is_liked
FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status != 'DELETED'
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.summary, p.status, p.view_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_locked, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.id AS author_id, u.name AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.post_id = p.id) AS reply_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS like_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` l WHERE l.post_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_liked
0 AS is_liked
FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{postId}
